steps.title: Find the shared traits
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between Uros House and Golden Connection. The notes show that both works are LED light sculptures by Mariela Santos.

steps.title: Avoid contrasts
steps.content: Choice B emphasizes the difference between smooth domes and tangled tubes. Choice C discusses only Uros House. Choice D contrasts their sizes. The statement that both are Santos's LED light sculptures gives the requested similarity. The answer is A.
